question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention the chapters or main sections of the thesis at all. It only focuses on defining the problem and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any sections. While it describes the problem and the goal of the prototype, it lacks a description of the thesis's structural components.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not discernible from this text. The text is repetitive (the second paragraph largely repeats the first) and lacks a roadmap of how the research or development is organized.
